description: Inspect a Neuropixels recording: streams, channel count, duration, sampling rate, probe info, bad-channel detection, and 1 s signal statistics. Read-only.
rules: degrades gracefully (still writes the report, exit 0) when spikeinterface is absent
usage: Set DATA_PATH (recording dir) and optional STREAM_NAME (default imec0.ap). Output: explore_report.txt.
limitation: Requires the spikeinterface library (and a readable SpikeGLX recording) to produce real stats; without it the report records that the dependency was missing.
